//: Azure Static Web Apps routing config for the PhotoGallery Angular SPA.
Angular 19 owns client-side routing. Without `navigationFallback`, SWA
serves a 404 for any URL that isn't a literal file in the bundle —
which means /login, /code/:code, /albums/:id, etc., all break on hard
refresh, on direct navigation, and after logout. The fallback rewrites
any non-file URL to index.html so the Angular Router can pick up the
The `exclude` list keeps static-asset requests from being rewritten,
so a missing image still 404s correctly instead of returning the SPA
